title: Intra-articular Injection with Strengthening Exercise and Physiotherapy for Knee Osteoarthritis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fm49","text":"This randomized controlled, single-blind trial will compare the effectiveness of a 40 mg triamcinolone acetonide intra-articular injection combined with strengthening exercises versus conventional physiotherapy in adults aged 40–70 years with knee osteoarthritis. Sixty participants will be randomly assigned to either the injection-plus-exercise group or the physiotherapy-only group, receiving three sessions per week for eight weeks. Pain will be the primary outcome, measured by the Numeric Pain Rating Scale (NPRS), secondary outcomes—physical function, joint range of motion, lower-limb strength, and mobility—will be evaluated using the Western Ontario and McMaster Universities Osteoarthritis Index (WOMAC), goniometer, 30-Second Sit-to-Stand Test, and Timed Up and Go Test.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7h6b0","text":"The study is expected to show greater improvements in pain relief, mobility, range of motion, and muscle strength in the injection-plus-exercise group compared to physiotherapy alone. These findings may support more effective, evidence-based treatment strategies for knee osteoarthritis in clinical practice.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"cmvdf","text":"To ensure accurate and standardized execution of the randomized controlled trial (RCT) evaluating intra-articular corticosteroid (CS) injection combined with strengthening exercises and  physiotherapy in knee osteoarthritis, the following guidelines must be followed:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3os2o","text":"Study Oversight:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b0pig","text":"Conduct the single-center RCT at JUST. Randomization will use a computer-generated sequence with allocation concealment via sealed envelopes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c2ocd","text":"Blinding:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6vgjm","text":"Outcome assessors will be blinded to group allocation. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fa35u","text":"Training:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6i5k8","text":"Ensure trained professionals perform all interventions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1os0r","text":"Orthopedic Surgeon: CS injection administration","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9sfc3","text":"Certified Physiotherapist: Supervised strengthening exercises","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1pk9a","text":"Assessors: Outcome measurement tools (NPRS, WOMAC, TUG, 30-STS, goniometer)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1uaqo","text":"Participant Screening:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"betal","text":"Confirm eligibility based on inclusion criteria: age 40–70, pain, morning stiffness of shorter than 30 minutes or knee crepitus confirmed by a rheumatologist (grades I-III in the Kellgren Lawrence score.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a329e","text":"Intervention Delivery:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dgfi1","text":"Control Group: Deliver an 8-week supervised physiotherapy exercise program (3 sessions per week)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aepar","text":"Experimental Group: Intra-articular CS injection plus strengthening exercise program starting 7 days post-injection.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"p0q9","text":"Outcome Assessments:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9snlc","text":"Blinded assessors will measure pain (NPRS), functional mobility (TUG), strength (30-STS), knee ROM (goniometer), and physical function (WOMAC).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6g92a","text":"Data Management:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ucov","text":"Record data on structured forms, anonymize participant information, store in a password-protected database, and conduct regular quality checks to ensure accuracy and completeness.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"4a10i","text":"Materials","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aq74n","text":"1. Corticosteroid Injection","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"11kk0","text":"Preparation: 40 mg Triamcinolone Acetonide, 2% lidocaine","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"821ul","text":"Injection Equipment: 25-gauge needles, 10 ml syringes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8ir5m","text":"2. Strengthening Exercises","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6218k","text":"Equipment: Resistance bands, ankle weights, floor mats, pillows/bolsters.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"au894","text":"Instructional: Printed exercise guides (English/Bengali), home exercise diaries.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9vr7s","text":"Monitoring: Timer, attendance and adherence log sheets.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fipsd","text":"3. Outcome Assessments","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3lpc5","text":"Pain: Numeric Pain Rating Scale (NPRS) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ed9o6","text":"Physical Function \u0026 Strength: WOMAC and 30-Second Sit-to-Stand (30-STS) setup (chair, stopwatch), Timed Up and Go (TUG) setup, goniometer for ROM.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bma20","text":"4. Data Management","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"u02v","text":"Forms: Data collection sheets for NPRS, WOMAC, TUG, 30-STS, ROM, and adverse events.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"71tsf","text":"Storage: Password-protected computer database, external hard drive/secure cloud storage, locked filing cabinet for physical forms.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cdefi","text":"5. Safety/Emergency","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rhi7","text":"Supplies: First aid kit, hand sanitizers, surface disinfectants, and emergency contact list.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"heu1","text":"6. Participant Materials","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8pusk","text":"Informed consent forms and study information sheets (English/Bengali).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
